sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63881" key="lopadarpagi/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοπᾰδ-αρπᾰγίδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dishsnatcher</tr_>, Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
